subcodes.first_line: Your letter has reached me, yet I find myself utterly devoid of the opportunity to enter into an exposition or interpretation thereof, for inquiries from every direction abound without end [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکتوب شما رسید ولی ابدا فرصت شرح و تفسیر نه سوالات از اطراف بیحد و پایان لهذا
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @station of the Manifestation of God
